_comment: Schedule shape + session bounds + autoregulation knobs. day_of_week is 0=Monday .. 6=Sunday. archetype names match those handled by routine_generator. Edit to change weekly programming shape.
_notes: session_set_ceiling=25 caps total hard sets per session.
skill_ceiling=2 means barbell tier-3 movements are excluded until the Sports Medicine seat is fully staffed (interim).
weekly_volume_cap_per_muscle=22 is an absolute fail-safe; landmarks per muscle may set tighter MRV.
